VISIT OUR DENTIST AT SHERWOOD PARK’S

EMERALD HILLS DENTAL CENTRE

Dr Hofmann, Dr Tezin Jaffer and Dr Ryan Gauf are dentists at Sherwood Park’s Emerald Hills Dental Centre, ready to serve your dental health needs. We strive to always put patient needs first and endeavour to make your experience as comfortable, helpful, and professional as possible. From cosmetic and restorative treatments to surgical procedures and more, we serve patients of all ages. We can also bill directly to your insurance provider, and our rates are comparable to other general practising dentists in the area.
